dcf-terminal-value-sensitivity — B05

NEEDS-VISUAL → scaleComparisonShould show: objects or quantities compared on a shared scale axis

Notice the rightmost column — EV nearly triples as g moves from 1.5 to 4.5 percent. Moving down a WACC row shrinks EV by at most half. g is the dominant driver.
